headerDisplay: Expose Shelly Pro 3EM total grid power as three Apple Home light sensors. The displayed lux value represents watts. This dynamic platform supports Homebridge's standard child-bridge mode.
footerDisplay: **Base Load** is the current residual grid draw, **Surplus** is power being fed into the grid, and **Absolute Grid Flow** is the value in either direction. Enable **Invert Direction** if the readings are reversed.

consumptionSensorName.title: Base Load Sensor Name
consumptionSensorName.description: Current residual power drawn from the grid.

surplusSensorName.title: Surplus Sensor Name
surplusSensorName.description: Surplus power currently being fed into the grid.

netFlowSensorName.title: Absolute Grid Flow Sensor Name
netFlowSensorName.description: Absolute grid flow regardless of direction.

deadbandWatts.title: Zero Deadband (W)
deadbandWatts.description: Treat absolute readings below this value as zero.
